must_detect.matched_text: embargo control: do not circulate the earnings presentation v3 outside IR until 15 june 2026, 17:00 IST (embargo) to align with NSE/BSE disclosure practice

memo: compliance review of investor-relations draft and dpdpa controls — Nimora Dynamics Limited (listed on NSE/BSE)
public-source references: press release dated 10 jan 2025 and FY24 annual report already available on exchange portals; this memo does not add unpublished price-sensitive information
pii handling: do not request Aadhaar or PAN in investor sign-up forms; if a field persists, use clearly invalid placeholders like 9999-9999-9999 and XXXXX0000X in screenshots only, never in production
children: marketing list must exclude individuals self-declared under 18; parental consent under the Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023 is mandatory for any outreach involving a minor
consent and purpose: capture click-wrap consent for email updates; purpose-limit to IR communications; retention 12 months; deletion requests route to compliance@nimoradynamics.example
trading window: remains open as per the published results calendar; no board agenda contains UPSI; insider list refresh scheduled with no additions this cycle
negated mac language: the draft vendor agreement for a staff spa-day wellness tie-up states no MAC/MAE condition and is non-material, prepaid, and outside the scope of SEBI PIT
lowercase pm note: todo — upload the already-announced Q1 board pack to the dataroom; link to the BSE filing is public and can be used in FAQs
sebi pit compliance: all mentions of “deal”, “merger”, or “term sheet” in research notes are illustrative case studies from public journals and do not pertain to Nimora Dynamics Limited
definitive agreement status: the only executed definitive agreement under review is a routine lease renewal disclosed via public notice; embargo on that item was lifted on 01 march 2026
embargo control: do not circulate the earnings presentation v3 outside IR until 15 june 2026, 17:00 IST (embargo) to align with NSE/BSE disclosure practice
mnpi markers: remove phrases like “not public” from generic checklists unless UPSI is actually present; prefer neutral labels such as “draft for review”
gstin collection: vendor onboarding must accept “GSTIN not applicable” for individuals and avoid capturing tax IDs during event registration; route queries to helpdesk@nimoradynamics.example
illustrative metrics: placeholders such as “12% margin uplift” in the draft deck are design examples and must be replaced only with numbers already filed with the stock exchanges
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation

must_not_detect.reason: Wellness/employee event reference, not Share Purchase Agreement (SPA).
Role noun for a contracting party, not PII or MNPI.

uncertain.reason: Retention period is a privacy control under DPDPA but no explicit retention rule is listed in allowed markers.
Consent capture is legally relevant but only withdrawal/erasure is enumerated in allowed rules.
Embargo timing is sensitive; current rules flag the 'embargo' keyword but not the scheduled date/time value.
UPSI is referenced in a negated compliance statement; relevance is contextual and may be excluded by strict detectors.
